title: Battlegrounds Mobile India Showdown/2022

23rd, 2022 ** '''Squad {{Abbr/TPP}}:''' 24 Teams. *** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|24 teams}} from [[Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Pro_Series/Season_1|Pro Series S1]] , [[Battlegrounds Mobile India Series/2021|BGIS 2021]] and [[BGMI Masters Series|Masters Series]] ** 3 Days of Group Stage - 24 teams are split into 3 groups. *** Total 6 matches per day. *** Each team play 4 matches per day in a ''Round-Robin Format'', to a total of 12 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} advance to ''Finals''.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' July 24th, 2022 ** 16 teams ** 6 Matches ** '''{{Bgcolortext|up|Champion}}''' qualify for {{LeagueIconSmall/pubg mobile world invitational|}} '''[[PUBG_Mobile_World_Invitational/2022/Afterparty_Showdown|PUBG Mobile World Invitational 2022: Afterparty Showdown]]''' ====Points Distribution==== {{Points15|killterm=finish}} ====Schedules==== {{box|start|padding=2em}}
